{{Quote|It has since been discovered that she has spent the last year in clandestine meetings with Bail Organa, Jan Dodonna, Keenal Dene, Bel Iblis (who will likely be joining his co-conspirators on the list soon), and other Rebel leaders, supervising the final transition of their outlaw political party into a paramilitary organization.|An Imperial HoloVision report describing Mon Mothma|<ref name="Galaxywide" />}}
'''Keenal Dene''' was a leader of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] in its early development. According to a report published on [[Imperial HoloVision]]<ref name="Galaxywide" /> in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="Galaxy NewsNets date">The [[Imperial HoloVision]] report in {{JournalCite|4|Galaxywide NewsNets}} states that it takes place on 35:9:1 of the [[Great ReSynchronization]] calendar, which corresponds to [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> [[Chandrilan/Legends|Chandrilan]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] resigned from the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] and disappeared,<ref name="Galaxywide" /> although she had actually fled the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to escape [[Death/Legends|execution]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for her work in building the Alliance.<ref name="NEGTC">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref> The report stated that Mothma had been secretly meeting Rebel leaders, including Dene amongst others such as [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]], [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], and [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]].<ref name="Galaxywide" />

==Behind the scenes==
Keenal Dene was mentioned in the [[Galaxywide NewsNets]] section written by [[Paul Sudlow]] and published in the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 4|fourth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' magazine, which was published by [[West End Games]] in [[November]] of [[1994]].<ref name="Galaxywide" />
